response.justification: Candidate is a strong generalist full-stack engineer with deep experience in TypeScript/Node.js, DLang, and web platforms, but the role requires native-level Japanese proficiency and specialized embedded networking/security expertise that are absent from the resume. The Japanese language requirement alone is a hard disqualifier, and the candidate lacks demonstrable experience with LAN-switch firmware, MACsec, 802.1X, Linux kernel modification, or chip-vendor SDKs.
strengths: Long track record of software development across multiple languages including C/C++ at National Instruments
Strong engineering discipline with TDD, CI/CD, and testing expertise
Linux familiarity and some low-level/systems work via DLang microservices
concerns: No native-level Japanese proficiency indicated (hard requirement)
No embedded firmware, LAN-switch, or networking security experience (MACsec, 802.1X, NETCONF)
No evidence of Linux kernel source modification or chip-vendor SDK work
